until false end el=function(mk,ml) local mm,mn,mo,mp,mq,mr,ms,mt mn={} mr={-47716,-52132,-20243,-49784,-27675,-58600,-31346,-25921,-59357,-837} mo=function(mu) local mv=mr[mu] local mw=(mu*692)%4096 ew=function(bel,bem) local ben,beo,bep,beq,ber,bes,bet,beu,bev,bew,bex,bey,bez,bfa,bfb,bfc,bfd,bfe,bff,bfg,bfh,bfi,bfj,bfk,bfl,bfm,bfn,bfo,bfp,bfq,bfr,bfs,bft,bfu,bfv,bfw beo={} bvr=1,bvq do bkg[bvm+bvr-1]=bjt[bvr] end else local bvs=bjn[bjk] local bvt=bjn[bjj] local bvu=bjn[bjm] local bvv=bkg[bvt] local bvw=bkg[bvu] bkg[bvs]=bvv(bvw) end else else do for bxm=bkm,1,-1 do local bxn=bkk[bxm] local bxo=bki[bxn] if bxo then local bxp=bxo[1] if bxp==0 then if bxo[2]==bkg then bxo[1]=1 bxo[2]={bxo[2][bxo[3]]} bxo[3]=1 end else if bxp==bkg then cds=bn[30](bn[19]) local cdt=bn[30](bn[19]) local cdu=cdt local cdv=bim[cdu] bkg[cds]=cdv[1] end end else bn[20]=bjn[bjl] local cdw=bn[30](bn[19]) local cdx=bn[30](bn[19]) local cdy=bn[30](bn[19]) bkg[cdw][bkg[cdx]]=bkg[cdy];end end else bn[20]=bjn[bjl] local cdz=bn[30](bn[19]) local cea=bn[30](bn[19]) local ceb=cea bim[ceb][1]=bkg[cdz] end else bn[20]=bjn[bjl] local cec=bn[30](bn[19]) local ced=bn[30](bn[19]) local cee=bn[30](bn[19]) bkg[cec]=bkg[ced][bkg[cee]];end end else bn[20]=bjn[bjl] local cef=bn[30](bn[19]) local ceg=bn[30](bn[19]) local ceh=ceg bkg[cef]=bim[ceh] end end end end end end end end end else bkg[bjn[bjk]]=bkg[bjn[bjj]];end end end end else bjo=_bit[biq[bjq+bn[1][43]][bjj]] bkg[bjn[bjk]]=_bit[bjn[bjj]];end else if bkh>=361 then bkg[bjn[bjk]]=bjo;else if bkh>=360 then bjo=_bit[biq[bjq+1][bjj]] local cei=bjn[bjk] bkg[cei]=bkg[cei]();else bkg[bjn[bjk]]=bjo;end end end end else if bkh<=348 then if bkh<=345 then if bkh>=345 then bjp=_bit[biq[bjq+bn[1][43]][bjj]] bkg[bjn[bjk]]=bjo;else bjo=nil bkg[bjn[bjk]]=bjp;end else if bkh>=348 then bjp=nil bkg[bjn[bjk]]=bjo;else if bkh>=347 then bjo=nil bkg[bjn[bjk]]=bjp;else bjo=_bit[biq[bjq+bn[1][43]][bjj]] bkg[bjn[bjk]]=bjp;end end end else if bkh<=351 then if bkh<=349 then bjo=nil bkg[bjn[bjk]]=bjp;else bjp=nil bkg[bjn[bjk]]=bjo;end else if bkh<=352 then bjo=nil bkg[bjn[bjk]]=bjp;else bjp=nil bkg[bjn[bjk]]=bjo;end end end end end else if bkh>=300 then if bkh<=310 then if bkh>=306 then if bkh>=309 then if bkh<=309 then if bjn[bjj]~=219 then local cej=biq[bkg[bjn[bjl]]] local cek,cel,cem=cej[bjj],cej[bjm],cej[bjk] cej[bjk]=cek cej[bjj]=cel cej[bjm]=cem bjn[bjj]=219 end else if bjn[bjj]~=157 then local cen=biq[bkg[bjn[bjl]]] local ceo,cep,ceq=cen[bjm],cen[bjj],cen[bjk] cen[bjk]=ceo cen[bjj]=cep cen[bjm]=ceq bjn[bjj]=157 end end else if bkh<=307 then if bkh>=307 then local cer=bjn[bjj] bkg[bjn[bjk]]=bim[cer] else local ces=bjn local cet=ces[bjk][1] local ceu=ces[bjm][1] local cev,cew,cex=bkg[cet],bkg[cet+1],bkg[cet+bn[1][6][1]] while cev<=cew do bkg[cet]=cev bkg[cet+bn[1][43]]=cev bkg[ces[bjk][2]]=bkg[ces[bjj][2]] local cey,cez=bkg[ces[bjj][3]],ces[bjk][3];bkg[cez+1]=cey;bkg[cez]=cey[_bit[ces[bjm][3]]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=bkg[ces[bjk][4]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=bkg[ces[bjk][5]] local cfa cfa=_bit[ces[bjj][6]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=cfa local cfb=ces[bjk][7] local cfc=bke[bju] local cfd=bke[bju-1] local cfe=bke[bju-bn[1][6][1]] bju=bju-bn[1][43] bkg[cfb]=cfe(cfd,cfc) bkg[ces[bjk][8]]=bkg[ces[bjj][8]] local cff,cfg=bkg[ces[bjj][9]],ces[bjk][9];bkg[cfg+1]=cff;bkg[cfg]=cff[_bit[ces[bjm][9]]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=bkg[ces[bjk][10]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=bkg[ces[bjk][11]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=bkg[ces[bjk][12]] bkg[ces[bjk][13]]={} bkg[ces[bjk][14]]=_bit[ces[bjj][14]] bkg[ces[bjk][15]][bkg[ces[bjj][15]]]=bkg[ces[bjm][15]] bkg[ces[bjk][16]]=_bit[ces[bjj][16]] bkg[ces[bjk][17]]={} bkg[ces[bjk][18]][bkg[ces[bjj][18]]]=bkg[ces[bjm][18]] bkg[ces[bjk][19]]=_bit[ces[bjj][19]] bkg[ces[bjk][20]]=bkg[ces[bjj][20]][bkg[ces[bjm][20]]] bkg[ces[bjk][21]][bkg[ces[bjj][21]]]=bkg[ces[bjm][21]] bkg[ces[bjk][22]]=_bit[ces[bjj][22]] bkg[ces[bjk][23]][bkg[ces[bjj][23]]]=bkg[ces[bjm][23]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=bkg[ces[bjk][24]] local cfh=bke[bju] local cfi=bke[bju-1] local cfj=bke[bju-bn[1][6][1]] local cfk=bke[bju-bn[1][43]] bju=bju-bn[1][46] cfk(cfj,cfi,cfh) cev=cev+cex end bkg[cet]=cev bjq=ces[bjj][1] end else local cfl=bjn local cfm=cfl[bjk][1] local cfn=cfl[bjm][1] local cfo,cfp,cfq=bkg[cfm],bkg[cfm+1],bkg[cfm+bn[1][6][1]] while cfo<=cfp do bkg[cfm]=cfo bkg[cfm+bn[1][43]]=cfo bkg[cfl[bjk][2]]=bkg[cfl[bjj][2]] local cfr,cfs=bkg[cfl[bjj][3]],cfl[bjk][3];bkg[cfs+1]=cfr;bkg[cfs]=cfr[_bit[cfl[bjm][3]]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=bkg[cfl[bjk][4]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=bkg[cfl[bjk][5]] local cft cft=_bit[cfl[bjj][6]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=cft local cfu=cfl[bjk][7] local cfv=bke[bju] local cfw=bke[bju-1] local cfx=bke[bju-bn[1][6][1]] bju=bju-bn[1][43] bkg[cfu]=cfx(cfw,cfv) bkg[cfl[bjk][8]]=bkg[cfl[bjj][8]] local bke[bju]=bkf bkg[cfl[bjk][15]]={} bkg[cfl[bjk][16]]=_bit[cfl[bjj][16]] bkg[cfl[bjk][17]][bkg[cfl[bjj][17]]]=bkg[cfl[bjm][17]] bkg[cfl[bjk][18]]=_bit[cfl[bjj][18]] bkg[cfl[bjk][19]]={} bju=bju-bn[1][46] cgv(cgu,cgt,cgs) cgh=cgh+cgj end bkg[cgf]=cgh bjq=cge[bjj][1] else if bkh>=304 then local cgw=bjn local cgx=cgw[bjk][1] local cgy=cgw[bjm][1] local chq=chp[bjk][1] local chr=chp[bjm][1] local chs,cht,chu=bkg[chq],bkg[chq+1],bkg[chq+bn[1][6][1]] while chs<=cht do bkg[chq]=chs bkg[chq+bn[1][43]]=chs bkg[chp[bjk][2]]=_bit[chp[bjj][2]] bkg[chp[bjk][3]]=bkg[chp[bjj][3]]..bkg[chp[bjm][3]] chs=chs+chu end bkg[chq]=chs bjq=chp[bjj][1] end end else if bkh<=301 then if bkh<=300 then local chv=bjn[bjk] local chw=bke[bju] local chx=bke[bju-1] local chy=bke[bju-bn[1][6][1]] local chz=bke[bju-bn[1][43]] bju=bju-bn[1][46] do local cia,cib=chz(chy,chx,chw) bkg[chv]=cia bkg[chv+1]=cib end else local cic=bjn local cid=cic[bjk][1] local cie,cif,cig=bkg[cid],bkg[cid+1],bkg[cid+bn[1][6][1]] bkg[cid]=k(function() for cih,cii in cie,cif,cig do j(true,cih,cii) end end) bka=cid+bn[1][6][1] while true do local cij,cik,cil=bkg[cid]() if not cij then break end do local cim,cin=cik,cil bkg[cid+bn[1][43]]=cim bkg[cid+bn[1][46]]=cin end bkg[cic[bjk][2]]=bkg[cic[bjj][2]] local cio,cip=bkg[cic[bjj][3]],cic[bjk][3];bkg[cip+1]=cio;bkg[cip]=cio[_bit[cic[bjm][3]]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=bkg[cic[bjk][4]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=bkg[cic[bjk][5]] local ciq=cic[bjk][6] local cir=bke[bju] local cis=bke[bju-1] bju=bju-bn[1][6][1] cis(cir) end bjq=cic[bjj][1] end else local cit=bjn local ciu=cit[bjk][1] local civ=cit[bjm][1] local ciw,cix,ciy=bkg[ciu],bkg[ciu+1],bkg[ciu+bn[1][6][1]] while ciw<=cix do bkg[ciu]=ciw bkg[ciu+bn[1][43]]=ciw bkg[cit[bjk][2]]=bin[_bit[cit[bjj][2]]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=bkg[cit[bjk][3]] bkg[cit[bjk][4]]=bkg[cit[bjj][4]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=bkg[cit[bjk][5]] local ciz=cit[bjk][6] local cja=bke[bju] local cjb=bke[bju-1] bju=bju-bn[1][6][1] cjb(cja) bkg[cit[bjk][7]]=bin[_bit[cit[bjj][7]]] bkg[cit[bjk][8]]=_bit[cit[bjj][8]] bkg[cit[bjk][9]]=bkg[cit[bjj][9]][bkg[cit[bjm][9]]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=bkg[cit[bjk][10]] bkg[cit[bjk][11]]=_bit[cit[bjj][11]] bkf=bkg[cit[bjk][12]] bju=bju+1 bke[bju]=bkf local cjc=cit[bjk][14] local cjd=bke[bju] local cje=bke[bju-1] bju=bju-bn[1][6][1] cje(cjd) ciw=ciw+ciy end bkg[ciu]=ciw bjq=cit[bjj][1] end end end else if bkh<=316 then if bkh<=313 then if bkh>=313 then if bjn[bjj]~=63 then local cjf=biq[bkg[bjn[bjm]]] local cjg,cjh=cjf[bjj],cjf[bjk] cjf[bjk]=cjg cjf[bjj]=cjh bjn[bjj]=63 end else if bkh>=312 then if bjn[bjj]~=150 then local cji=biq[bkg[bjn[bjl]]] local cjj,cjk,cjl=cji[bjk],cji[bjm],cji[bjj] cji[bjk]=cjj cji[bjj]=cjk cji[bjm]=cjl bjn[bjj]=150 end else if bjn[bjj]~=35 then local cjm=biq[bkg[bjn[bjm]]] local cjn,cjo=cjm[bjj],cjm[bjk] cjm[bjk]=cjn cjm[bjj]=cjo bjn[bjj]=35 end end end else if bkh<=315 then if bkh<=314 then if bjn[bjk]~=254 then local cjp=biq[bkg[bjn[bjl]]] local cjq,cjr,cjs=cjp[bjj],cjp[bjm],cjp[bjk] cjp[bjk]=cjq cjp[bjj]=cjr cjp[bjm]=cjs bjn[bjk]=254 end else if bjn[bjk]~=93 then local cjt=biq[bkg[bjn[bjl]]] local cju,cjv,cjw=cjt[bjm],cjt[bjj],cjt[bjk] cjt[bjk]=cju cjt[bjj]=cjv cjt[bjm]=cjw bjn[bjk]=93 end end else if bjn[bjj]~=238 then local cjx=biq[bkg[bjn[bjm]]] local cjy,cjz=cjx[bjj],cjx[bjk] cjx[bjk]=cjy cjx[bjj]=cjz bjn[bjj]=238 end end end else if bkh>=320 then bkg[bjn[bjk]]=bjp;else if bkh<=318 then if bkh<=317 then local cka=bjn local ckb=bjq if cka[bjl]==80 then bkg[cka[bjk]]=bin[_bit[cka[bjj]]];else if cka[bjl]==56 then bkg[cka[bjk]]=-bkg[cka[bjj]];else if cka[bjl]==83 then if ckc[bjl]==281 then bkg[ckc[bjk]][bkg[ckc[bjj]]]=bkg[ckc[bjm]];end end end bjq=bjq+1 else bjo=_bit[biq[bjq+bn[1][43]][bjj]] bkg[bjn[bjk]]=_bit[bjn[bjj]];end else local ckd=biu[bjn[bjl]] local cke=ckd[1]-1 local ckf=bke[bju] bju=bju-1 bkg[cke]=ckf() end end end end else if bkh<=288 then if bkh>=284 then if bkh>=287 then if bkh<=287 then if bkg[bjn[bjk]]==nil or bkg[bjn[bjk]]==false then bjq=bjn[bjj];end;else local ckg=bke[bju] local ckh=bke[bju-1] bju=bju-bn[1][6][1] local cki=bjv(bjt,ckh(ckg)) bka=bjn[bjk]+cki-1 for ckj=1,cki do bkg[bjn[bjk]+ckj-1]=bjt[ckj] end end else if bkh>=286 then bkg[biq[bjq][bjk]]=bkg[biq[bjq][bjj]]==bkg[biq[bjq][bjm]];else if bkh<=284 then local ckk=bke[bju] local ckl=bke[bju-1] local ckm=bke[bju-bn[1][6][1]] local ckn=bke[bju-bn[1][43]] bju=bju-bn[1][46] bkg[bjn[bjk]]=ckn(ckm,ckl,ckk) else local cko=biu[bjn[bjl]] local ckp=cko[1]-1 local ckq=bke[bju] local ckr=bke[bju-1] bju=bju-bn[1][6][1] local cks,ckt=ckr(ckq) do local cku,ckv=cks,ckt bkg[ckp]=cku bkg[ckp+1]=ckv end end end end else if bkh>=281 then if bkh<=282 then if bkh>=282 then bkg[biq[bjq][bjk]]=bkg[biq[bjq][bjj]]+bkg[biq[bjq][bjm]];else bkg[biq[bjq][bjk]]=bkg[biq[bjq][bjj]]~=bkg[biq[bjq][bjm]];end else if not(bkg[bjn[bjk]]==nil or bkg[bjn[bjk]]==false) then bjq=biq[bjq][bjj];end;end else if bkh>=280 then bkg[bjn[bjk]]=not(bkg[bjn[bjj]]~=bkg[bjn[bjm]]);else if bkh>=279 then local ckw=biu[bjn[bjl]] local ckx=ckw[1]-1 local cky=bke[bju] local ckz=bke[bju-1] local cla=bke[bju-bn[1][6][1]] bju=bju-bn[1][43] bkg[ckx]=cla(ckz,cky) else local clb=bke[bju] bju=bju-1 clb() end end end end else if bkh>=295 then if bkh<=297 then if bkh<=296 then if bkh<=295 then bkg[biq[bjq][bjk]]=bkg[biq[bjq][bjj]]<bkg[biq[bjq][bjm]];else local clc=bjo local cld=bjn[bjj] local cle=bkg[clc] if not cle then bjq=cld;end;end else bkg[(bjn[bjk]-bjn[bjl])]=bkg[bn[1][5][1](bjn[bjj],bn[1][5][1](biq[bjq-1][bjj],(bjq+bjn[bjl])))][bkg[bjn[bjm]]];end else if bkh>=299 then do for clf=bkm,1,-1 do local clg=bkk[clf] local clh=bki[clg] if clh then local cli=clh[1] if cli==0 then if clh[2]==bkg then clh[1]=1 clh[2]={clh[2][clh[3]]} clh[3]=1 end else if cli==bkg then clh[1]={clh[1][clh[2]]} clh[2]=1 end end end bki[clg]=nil bkk[clf]=nil end bkm=0 local clj=bke[bju] bju=bju-1 return clj() end else if bjn[bjj]~=241 then local clk=biq[bkg[bjn[bjl]]] local cll,clm,cln=clk[bjj],clk[bjm],clk[bjk] clk[bjk]=cll clk[bjj]=clm clk[bjm]=cln bjn[bjj]=241 end end end else if bkh<=291 then if bkh<=290 then if bkh<=289 then bjo=biq[bjq+1][bjk] bkg[bjn[bjk]]=_bit[bjn[bjj]];else local clo=bjo local clp=_bit[bjn[bjl]] local clq=bkg[clo] bn[20]=1 bn[21]=bn[20] if f(bn[19],bn[20],bn[20]+bn[1][43])=="IB7O"then bl=bl*12+(-309663) bh=bh+(bi[23*131071+bl] or bj(23)) else bl=bl*26+(-765933) bk=bh+(bi[24*131071+bl] or bj(24)) bh=bk end else bl=0 bh=1159 end else if bh==905 then bl=bl*13+(-631182) bk=bh+(bi[13*131071+bl] or bj(13)) bh=bk elseif bh==901 then bn[25]=nil bn[25]=function(cuq) local cur,cus,cut,cuu,cuv,cuw,cux,cuy,cuz,cva cus={} cut=function(cvb,cvc,cvd) local cve=((cvc+cvd)-cvb)+cuv cus[cvc*131071+cuv]=cve return cve end cuu=0 cur=cuu cuv=cuu cuv=cuv*13+(8470) cuu=cur+(cus[681360*131071+cuv] or cut(192,681360,1795)) cur=cuu while cur~=481095 do if cur>691433 then if cur==691460 then cuu=cus[cuv*131071+11] or cur cur=cuu[10576] else cuv=0 cur=691460 end else if cur<=624434 then if cur<=117834 then if cur>47742 then if cur>60402 then if cur==117834 then cuy=cuy+cva cux=cuy cuv=cuv*16+(-481376) cur=cur+(cus[-86689*131071+cuv] or cut(2152,-86689,157)) else cuv=0 cur=691460 end else if cur==60402 then cuw=bn[1][11][1](cuw,bn[9](bn[1][6][2](cuq,bn[20],bn[20]),bn[1][37][6]*cux));bn[20]=bn[20]+1;cuv=cuv*23+(-1125905) cuu=cur+(cus[27501*131071+cuv] or cut(3745,27501,2428)) cur=cuu else cuv=0 cur=691460
